## [00:00 - 03:01]

Hello and welcome. I am Lane Amon, the director of content at Mastermind.com and we are here in the Mastermind studios with Noelle Ripay. Did I say that right? Yes, you did. Noelle is a marriage and family therapist, life coach and the founder of In Full Bloom Retreats. Through courses and workshops, she helps women 50 and older manifest the life of their dreams with art journaling. That sounds amazing. Can we get started right now? Did you bring all your tools and we can start doing collages and oh my gosh, I love that. I love that. I absolutely love that. Anyway, I'm so excited to have you here in the Mastermind studios talking about what life is like as a course creator. Courses have a near and dear to my heart. So tell me a little bit about your courses that you offer now. What does it look like now and then we'll go back to when you first started. Okay, so I created my first course because Dean told me that I had to do it and he was doing so amazing. Everything he was teaching was so amazing that I did it. But yes, my courses evolved. And one of the things I would say is that at the beginning I thought I needed to have the niche clear and I was going to marry this niche and this is going to be all I was going to be doing for the rest of my life and I get bored very easily. So I had a hard time finding my niche. What happened is that as I started creating courses, my first course started changing me as a person, not only my clients. Me, if I think about me, who I was when I course, my first course was on emptiness moms. It's called emptiness fulfilled life. It's a beautiful course is very dear to me. And I created it because that's what I knew what I was good at when I started mastermind. But what I really wanted to do was talk to all kinds of women who had lost the purpose in life. I lost my purpose in life when my daughters walked out of the house. For me, it was like, I didn't know where I was standing. I was confused. I wasn't inspired. Like I lacked vibrancy. So I said, okay, I create this course for emptiness moms. But as I evolved, now I'm doing this courses. I just found it in full bloom retreats, which is amazing. And I'm doing retreats in my house. And then I'm doing courses to support the retreats. And it's amazing. But my life changed so much because I started with a course. Everything who I am right now at 56, happy, like you have no idea. So feeling so alive and vibrant more than ever, it all started with a course. There's a couple of things I want to pick up on there. One is the idea that where you start doesn't have to be where you stay forever. And a lot of people, people who are watching

this right now are probably at the beginning of the MBS of mastermind business system. So they may not have gotten deep into the program yet. want to go? If you don't know where you want to go, if you don't know where you are, how are you going to get there? Then you have the third, which is why? Why do you want it so much? your adult children and three easy steps. Oh, wow. And so I went really deep. Yep. So it's always beautiful to have a next place to take your people.
